steps.title: Count the additional people
steps.content: The first person costs $11$ dollars. In a group of $n$ people, the number of additional people is $n-1$, each costing $7$ dollars.

steps.title: Write and simplify the total
steps.content: The total charge is $$ g(n)=11+7(n-1) $$ $$ g(n)=11+7n-7=7n+4 $$ The answer is C.
